headline: OPW Engineered Systems Launches HyperFlow High-Flow Data Center Coupler
summary: OPW Engineered Systems, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the launch of the HyperFlow™ high-flow data center dry disconnect coupler. The new fitting is designed to help meet the growing performance and reliability demands of liquid-cooled data centers driven by artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing workloads. Engineered for strong flow capacity with minimal pressure drop, the HyperFlow coupler helps safeguard critical computing infrastructure from fluid leaks.
